brief_notes: All key numerical claims precisely match extraction: EF1%=16.72 vs 11.9 second-best, 2x factor at 0.5/1.0% ROC enrichment, 5.5B Enamine REAL library (80% synthesis rate), ~6M docked (0.11%), 7 KLHDC2 hits (14% hit rate), C29 IC50 ~3 uM, 4.1B ZINC22 library, ~4.5M docked (0.11%), 4 NaV1.7 hits (44.4% hit rate), Z8739902234 IC50=1.32 uM (CI 1.14-1.55), resting IC50=13.1 uM (CI 12.78-13.45), Z8739905023 IC50=2.23 uM (CI 2.14-2.46), NaV1.5 selectivity 5.14 uM, hERG 6.27 uM. Comprehensive campaign tables and IC50 data tables. Six figures referenced covering pipeline, benchmarks, active learning, hit rates, and IC50 data.
